name: Demo Scenario: Strong System
description: Low-constraint Mars mission with a stable balanced stack. This is the safest quick-start demo.
expected_outcome: Expected outcome: full mission completion or long survival under baseline conditions.

name: Demo Scenario: Average System
description: Medium-constraint Mars mission with a workable but average stack for pressure-trend demos.
expected_outcome: Expected outcome: visible pressure growth. Clean baseline usually survives, while extra runtime stress can push it toward late failure.

name: Demo Scenario: Failure Case
description: High-constraint ISS mission with a poor-fit calorie-focused stack. This is the fast failure demo.
expected_outcome: Expected outcome: early mission failure from rising risk and weak system fit.
